holdings.infoBox: IDEV is an equity ETF with a total of 2296 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 2.51%, HSBC Holdings at 1.10%, Roche Holding AG at 0.99%, Novartis AG at 0.96%, and Royal Bank of Canada at 0.95%.

overview.description: The iShares Core MSCI International Developed Markets ETF (IDEV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI World ex USA IMI index, a market-cap-weighted index of large-, mid, and small-cap stocks from developed countries, excluding the US. IDEV was launched on Mar 21, 2017 and is issued by BlackRock.
